message:
feat(codegen): Add PyValue-based list methods for unknown-typed objects

When type inference returns .unknown (e.g., module-level variables
accessed from closures), use runtime PyValue helpers for list methods:
- genAppendUnknown, genExtendUnknown, genInsertUnknown
- genPopUnknown, genClearUnknown

These generate calls to runtime.pyListAppendPV, etc. which work with
any list-like PyValue at runtime.

Also update method dispatch to route unknown-typed objects through
these helpers instead of trying the typed list methods.
